entry.title: New: Bill 100, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET; INCREASE ESTIMATED REVENUES, OTHER INTERGOVERNMENTAL BY $750,000; CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE, AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE, COUNTYWIDE UPGRADES AND REPLACEMENTS, INCREASE APPROPRIATION BY $750,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
